en: Again he began to teach beside the sea. And a very large crowd gathered about him, so that he got into a boat and sat in it on the sea, and the whole crowd was beside the sea on the land.
zh: 耶穌又在海邊教導人。有一大群人聚集到他那裡，因此他上船坐下來。船在海中，群眾都朝著海站在岸上。

en: And he was teaching them many things in parables, and in his teaching he said to them:
zh: 他用比喻教訓他們許多事，在教訓中他說：

en: "Listen! A sower went out to sow.
zh: “你們聽著！有一個撒種的出去撒種，

en: And as he sowed, some seed fell along the path, and the birds came and devoured it.
zh: 撒的時候，有的落在路旁，小鳥飛來就吃掉了。

en: Other seed fell on rocky ground, where it did not have much soil, and immediately it sprang up, since it had no depth of soil.
zh: 有的落在泥土不多的石地上，因為泥土不深，很快就長起來。

en: And when the sun rose it was scorched, and since it had no root, it withered away.
zh: 但太陽一出來，就把它曬乾，又因為沒有根就枯萎了。

en: Other seed fell among thorns, and the thorns grew up and choked it, and it yielded no grain.
zh: 有的落在荊棘裡，荊棘長起來，把它擠住，它就結不出果實來。

en: And other seeds fell into good soil and produced grain, growing up and increasing and yielding thirtyfold and sixtyfold and a hundredfold."
zh: 有的落在好土裡，就生長繁茂，結出果實，有三十倍的、有六十倍的、有一百倍的。”

en: And he said, "He who has ears to hear, let him hear."
zh: 耶穌又說：“有耳可聽的，就應當聽。”

en: And when he was alone, those around him with the twelve asked him about the parables.
zh: 耶穌獨自一人的時候，那些經常跟著他的人和十二門徒，來問這些比喻的意義。

en: And he said to them, "To you has been given the secret of the kingdom of God, but for those outside everything is in parables,
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“ 神的國的奧祕，只給你們知道，但對於外人，一切都用比喻，

en: so that "they may indeed see but not perceive, and may indeed hear but not understand, lest they should turn and be forgiven."
zh: 叫他們 ‘看是看見了，卻不領悟， 聽是聽見了，卻不明白， 免得他們回轉過來，得到赦免。’”

en: And he said to them, "Do you not understand this parable? How then will you understand all the parables?
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“你們不明白這個比喻，怎能明白一切比喻呢？

en: The sower sows the word.
zh: 撒種的人所撒的就是道。

en: And these are the ones along the path, where the word is sown: when they hear, Satan immediately comes and takes away the word that is sown in them.
zh: 那撒在路旁的，就是人聽了道，撒但立刻來，把撒在他心裡的道奪去。

en: And these are the ones sown on rocky ground: the ones who, when they hear the word, immediately receive it with joy.
zh: 照樣，那撒在石地上的，就是人聽了道，立刻歡歡喜喜地接受了；

en: And they have no root in themselves, but endure for a while. Then, when tribulation or persecution arises on account of the word, immediately they fall away.
zh: 可是他們裡面沒有根，只是暫時的；一旦為道遭遇患難，受到迫害，就立刻跌倒了。

en: And others are the ones sown among thorns. They are those who hear the word,
zh: 那撒在荊棘裡的，是指另一些人；他們聽了道，

en: but the cares of the world and the deceitfulness of riches and the desires for other things enter in and choke the word, and it proves unfruitful.
zh: 然而今世的憂慮、財富的迷惑，以及種種的慾望，接連進來，把道擠住，就結不出果實來。

en: But those that were sown on the good soil are the ones who hear the word and accept it and bear fruit, thirtyfold and sixtyfold and a hundredfold."
zh: 那撒在好土裡的，就是人聽了道，接受了，並且結出果實，有三十倍的、有六十倍的、有一百倍的。”

en: And he said to them, "Is a lamp brought in to be put under a basket, or under a bed, and not on a stand?
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“燈難道是拿來放在量器底下或床底下的嗎？它不是該放在燈臺上嗎？

en: For nothing is hidden except to be made manifest; nor is anything secret except to come to light.
zh: 因為沒有甚麼隱藏的事不被顯明出來，沒有甚麼掩蓋的事不被揭露的。

en: If anyone has ears to hear, let him hear."
zh: 有耳可聽的，就應當聽。”

en: And he said to them, "Pay attention to what you hear: with the measure you use, it will be measured to you, and still more will be added to you.
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“要留心你們所聽到的，你們用甚麼尺度量給人， 神也要用甚麼尺度量給你們，並且要超過尺度給你們。

en: For to the one who has, more will be given, and from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away."
zh: 因為那有的，還要給他；那沒有的，就算他有甚麼也要拿去。”

en: And he said, "The kingdom of God is as if a man should scatter seed on the ground.
zh: 耶穌說：“ 神的國好像人在地裡撒種，

en: He sleeps and rises night and day, and the seed sprouts and grows; he knows not how.
zh: 他夜裡睡覺，白天起來，種子發芽生長，自己也不知道怎麼會這樣的。

en: The earth produces by itself, first the blade, then the ear, then the full grain in the ear.
zh: 地生五穀是自然的，先長苗，後吐穗，最後穗上結滿了子粒。

en: But when the grain is ripe, at once he puts in the sickle, because the harvest has come."
zh: 莊稼熟了，就派人用鐮刀割下，因為收成的時候到了。”

en: And he said, "With what can we compare the kingdom of God, or what parable shall we use for it?
zh: 又說：“我們要把 神的國比作甚麼呢？我們可以用甚麼比喻來形容它呢？

en: It is like a grain of mustard seed, which, when sown on the ground, is the smallest of all the seeds on earth,
zh: 它好像一粒芥菜種，剛種下去的時候，比地上的一切種子都小，

en: yet when it is sown it grows up and becomes larger than all the garden plants and puts out large branches, so that the birds of the air can make nests in its shade."
zh: 種下以後，生長起來，卻比一切蔬菜都大，長出大枝子，甚至天空的飛鳥都可以在它的蔭下搭窩。”

en: With many such parables he spoke the word to them, as they were able to hear it.
zh: 耶穌用許多這樣的比喻，照著他們所能聽懂的，向他們講道；

en: He did not speak to them without a parable, but privately to his own disciples he explained everything.
zh: 不用比喻，就不對他們講。只有單獨和自己的門徒在一起的時候，才把一切解釋給他們聽。

en: On that day, when evening had come, he said to them, "Let us go across to the other side."
zh: 當天黃昏，耶穌對門徒說：“我們渡到海那邊去吧。”

en: And leaving the crowd, they took him with them in the boat, just as he was. And other boats were with him.
zh: 門徒離開群眾，耶穌已經在船上，他們就載他過去，也有別的船和他同去。

en: And a great windstorm arose, and the waves were breaking into the boat, so that the boat was already filling.
zh: 忽然起了狂風，波浪不斷地打進船來，艙裡積滿了水。

en: But he was in the stern, asleep on the cushion. And they woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?"
zh: 耶穌卻在船尾靠著枕頭睡著了。門徒把他叫醒，對他說：“老師，我們要死了，你不管嗎？”

en: And he awoke and rebuked the wind and said to the sea, "Peace! Be still!" And the wind ceased, and there was a great calm.
zh: 耶穌起來，斥責了風，又對海說：“不要作聲！安靜吧！”風就停止，大大地平靜了。

en: He said to them, "Why are you so afraid? Have you still no faith?"
zh: 然後對他們說：“為甚麼這樣膽怯呢？你們怎麼沒有信心呢？”

en: And they were filled with great fear and said to one another, "Who then is this, that even wind and sea obey him?"
zh: 門徒非常懼怕，彼此說：“這到底是誰，連風和海都聽從他？”
